---
title: "Battleship"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "Browser-based Battleship game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, playable against the computer."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-09-19
image: ../utils/battleship.png
categories:
  - HTML
  - CSS
  - JavaScript (ES6)
  - Webpack
  - Jest
  - OOP
  - TDD
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/battleship/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/battleship" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
